I get pretty nauseous when eating breakfast regardless of what it is.
Can or should I replace protein grams with grams of fat like I've been doing? There's 20 grams of fat alone in the eggs.
I'm trying so hard to eat 4 hours before bed. But having some issues, sometimes I skip lunch bc I'm not hungry then come 8-9pm and I'm starved and give in because I don't want to lose weight. Honestly I think a journal will help me keep on top of things.
Yes I'm grounding now.
No book yet but I will def love the read. Where can I find the podcasts?

### River — 2014-09-06T20:10:04+0300

I've been reading the forums and blogs since February, first time posting (will get a journal and introduction up soon). But I definitely felt compelled to reply to this post so will do so first.

I have long been a spiritual adventuress, having both studied and experienced many religions of the world and spiritual dogmas. I am a lover of nature, have a high level of awareness and am tolerant of most people. I have believed in and acted upon my intuition for so many years that I seriously can't discern the difference between it and the air that I breathe. i.e., it is no longer second nature it is first nature.

That said, since I started Epi-Paleo in February what has noticeably changed for me is a much shorter lapse of time between being aware of something and having an intellectual understanding of it. I've always had what I consider rapid cognition but it has become more an instantaneous cognition and I am able to solve many simple and complex tasks with little or not forethought or planning.

While some might consider this an increase in intuition, and perhaps it could be described that way, I'm pretty sure (and maybe Jack will comment) that with the increase in DHA (at least 2g per day from seafood meals) plus the hormonal fine-tuning and everything else that goes along with prioritizing circadian rhythm / minimal EMF, etc, is due to the synapses in my brain firing faster and faster between my optimized brain cells.

It's hard to describe, but I don't "think" in my head anymore, I do things in there. I feel at times somewhat like an observer of myself because I solve things before having an awareness of how I did it. So this could be an increase in intuition or an increase in brain health. Perhaps they are one and the same.

### Jack Kruse — 2014-09-06T21:45:19+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/have-any-of-you-experienced-increased-intuition-since-eating-epi-paleo.11661/post-140146>

> [Jack Kruse said:](/goto/post?id=140129)
>
> Prana has hit on my scale argument.........many when they first come here they seem confused. They understand things on a level of biochemistry when I speak the language of the quantum world. Your reality and nature functions on this level. It is time for you all to sink down to this level. I plan on bringing you there kicking and screaming until you see Lady evolution as I do.

Biology, medicine, and the ancestral health movement does not realize any of these mechanisms because they are on the more superficial scale of understanding today. Moreover, because their knowledge and beliefs do not operate at this quantum scale, they think it is bunk. Understanding scale is where wellness springs. Just because you do not appreciate it, does not mean it is not happening in reality. Most have no ability to understand the far reaching effects magnetism and cold has on cells. Magnetism is a synonym for cold thermogenesis. Magnetism is the father not the child to electricity in biology. The ancestor of every action in life was born of a thought from this unseen force. Our thoughts even come from the actions of electrons. Magnetism is an example of an unseen force that can alter biologic trajectory in many ways. Biology believes if they cannot measure it, it does not exist. Quantum physics says nothing can be truly measured, therefore it can and does exist. The only thing that remains for biology is to gain the ability to measure the magnetic effects of mitochondria. MEG, EEG, and MRI data already have given us ample information to believe all of our cells emit a substantial magnetic field. So it raises the question for you, the reader; what realm of science do you believe in now? When you understand the scale of how life organizes, do you begin to see why I embrace the quantum scale and why I share it with my readers?

I am not surprised that our language is incapable of describing the processes occurring within the atoms. Our language for was invented to describe the experiences of daily life we all share. These experiences consists only of processes involving exceedingly large numbers of atoms that are condensed and interacting with the 4 forces of nature simultaneously. It is very difficult to modify our language so that it will be able to describe these subatomic processes. Words can only describe things of which we can form mental pictures in our mind. I had to teach my mind to think this way over ten years ago to wrap my mind around these concepts. This ability is a result of the daily experience of collecting experience and then stringing it together to get nature’s wisdom. Fortunately, mathematics is not subject to this limitation of communication and this is why math is the language of nature. Most of us cannot understand this language well enough to understand how nature works. My job is to scale your mind to this level without the math. It is incredibly difficult task. Physicists and mathematics have made it possible to invent a mathematical scheme, called the quantum electrodynamic theory to describe this scale for themselves. This framework seems entirely adequate for the treatment of atomic processes. Where it fails, is that it won’t allow for visualization of the concepts. Visualization is how humans appear to learn best. This problem of scale is tough to overcome. We must content ourselves with two incomplete analogies in order to make sense of the quantum world—the wave picture of matter from math and the “corpuscular picture of matter” we all see daily with our eyes. My website is trying to create “a synkinesis effect” of the two bad analogies to make sense of how life organizes for you to understand.

Scale is a big deal in figuring out everything!!

# Thread: Sleep: good, better, best
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sleep-good-better-best.11665/>
**Subforum:** The New Monster Thread
**Posts:** 15
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Matty — 2014-09-06T20:16:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sleep-good-better-best.11665/post-140135>

I hope to pick the collective brains of all my fellow journey men & women on the road to optimal, specifically about WHERE to sleep.

I recently asked Jack on the Tensegrity blog and rather than risk annoying the man, I figured I'd move this over to here in hopes if gleaning the collective wisdom here!

Jack seems to be pushing for folks to sleep outdoors and on the ground. I love camping, don't get me wrong, but can I do this in my backyard? year round in Canada? I do love a challenge!

Currently I sleep in the basement of a 1976 side split home, on a 10 Gauss magnetico and latex foam mattress. I cut as much power as possible, with the exception of the freezer and fridge. No light what so ever, no distractions.

I sleep amazingly! I fall asleep in 2 minutes, I wake naturally no alarm, and I feel amazing every day. I do follow nearly every bit of advice Jack has shared with us and my physique, my mind and my general feeling of awesomeness has just got better and better the more I read and implement. For more info, search my only other post started in the meet n greet section for more about me. I have no health problems at present, only in the past, but I know here is always room for improvement!

So if I try to build some little teepee or mudhut in the backyard to sleep in, do I need to be connecting my bare skin, or at least cotton/wool clothes or blankets to the frozen Earth during the cold months? Or is the magnetism enough if I'm in a tent w/ A floor (vinyl? What's r tents made of?) and no mattress or padding?

If I stay Indoors, Jack said the suitability of the basement depends on whether there is a petroleum vapor barrier..... How do I find that out? The basement has the fuse box, most of which is shut down at night. The house unfortunately has a smart meter which I'm fighting the hydro co. about, and it's on the side where the upper floor rooms are. Lesser of two evils anyone?

If I'm using a magnetico, should I be concerned about the fuse box and/or smart meter? How does a magnetico fare vs sleeping on the Earth? In a tent? Etc. looking for a good, better, best analysis!

That's where my head is at, please chime in and give your two cents on this topic.

### prAna303 — 2014-09-06T21:15:23+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sleep-good-better-best.11665/post-140143>

> Jack seems to be pushing for folks to sleep outdoors and on the ground. I love camping, don't get me wrong, but can I do this in my backyard? year round in Canada? I do love a challenge!

Done my share of what many call extreme sleeping today, why? I often visit nature...

This is how and what i do.

First, get out and get in sync with the season. Spend as much time in the nature to slowly learn your system what season it is. Then you add sleep.

Second, i sleep many nights outside, perhaps 100 to 200 in a year. Must times in a natural shelter, on ground with a reindeer skin to lay my body on. I learn myself slowly to do it with as little clothes as possible, just wrap myself in the skin if it gets really harsh. I sleep like this down to minus 10 to minus 15 degrees celsius. Slowly add wool if you need to your body.

> So if I try to build some little teepee or mudhut in the backyard to sleep in, do I need to be connecting my bare skin, or at least cotton/wool clothes or blankets to the frozen Earth during the cold months? Or is the magnetism enough if I'm in a tent w/ A floor (vinyl? What's r tents made of?) and no mattress or padding?

I am planning to built a swedish Teepee this winter, have a couple of spots in the woods i like. Here i will use the natural ground like we have done for many years, just pack the mud into a floor. Here i can sleep directly on the ground without any problems. With tents i would say, compared with houses, great but still you could gain more effects by going natural, i think.

I have a big issue with how we sleep today... I also think we slowly brake down our backs and spines with these soft and comfy beds but the big one is that we do not let magnetism do the work with our nervous system.

### Matty — 2014-09-06T23:28:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sleep-good-better-best.11665/post-140152>

Very cool prAna! A reindeer skin sounds pretty sweet, I'll look into that, love the natural yet cozy sound of that. I've always liked sleeping sans mattress or padding when camping so a skin on the ground has great appeal. I think my wife may decide I've finally lost it, but poor thing, she loves me. Lol The kids on the other hand adore all my wackiness (compared to "normal") so they'd be right by my side!

Thanks for your input my friend, I hope to hear more about your Swedish teepee!

### River — 2014-09-07T03:41:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sleep-good-better-best.11665/post-140166>

> If I stay Indoors, Jack said the suitability of the basement depends on whether there is a petroleum vapor barrier..... How do I find that out?

You could possibly hire a contractor to take a 3 inch concrete core sample. Typically these are done to test the strength of concrete. In your case, the core comes out in one tubular shape and it should pull up a large enough piece of the vapor barrier to determine what type it is. You could take the piece to a hardware / lumber store perhaps and ask them if they can identify what type it is as an alternative.

There are also concrete core drills you can rent if you are a DIY'er. I'm not sure what is involved though.

Just an idea....

# Thread: Will a well Ententioned Critic/Skeptic be Welcome here?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/will-a-well-ententioned-critic-skeptic-be-welcome-here.11667/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 27
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Brother John — 2014-09-07T04:32:59+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/will-a-well-ententioned-critic-skeptic-be-welcome-here.11667/post-140170>

Dear Jack and Members,
I am a critical thinker by nature and by choice. My natural way of processing written material as well as many other life experiences is divided into 3 parts: I see, feel, sense, what I agree with, what I don't agree with and what I do not understand.

When I recognize a higher truth, ie a more complete truth, I will turn on a dime and accept it. But I don't like to fake it. I don't like to "go along to get along".

I read so many people on this blog that I appreciate as much more knowledgeable than I in many fields. I see people with incredible memory/recall and back grounds in medicine, biology, history of human consciousness, Quantum science and of course I mean JK but also many members here just blow my mind... I also see and feel the warm and kind intention that emits from you. Sometimes I read your personal stories of challenge and struggle and have so much heart filled respect for you. Somtimes my heart breaks open... There are a lot of tough cookies on this forum. I seek to emulate you.

I want to fill a space that I think needs to be filled.

There are a couple ways to criticize and one just starts fights and brings the energy down. I have no time for that. I will not respond to someones opinion by saying "Bullshit". I think that is an insulting way to communicate, in fact it's a deliberate insult. I have no interest in Ad Hominin attacks. I don't give em and I don't accept them.
The other way is to join forces through sensible debate or trading of ideas and perceptions to attain a greater truth, a higher good. That is what I would like to contribute.
There are brilliant contributers on this forum But sometimes I hear you all marching to the same beat and dancing the same moves. I want to add more rhythm and some different moves..

I believe that we are in the boat together and if we don't develop and accept and work at a higher level of communication we are lost. I believe that communication must include the open acceptance of disagreement and the willingness to work to the harmony, higher resonance, greater embodiment of truth and energy that is possible.

I would like to be of value here but if Dr K or the members do not welcome this idea. I'll accept that and leave critque out of my posts as much as I can and still participate.
Sincerely,
Brother John
PS if there are "back channel" ways to communicate with members, I would like to know!

### cantweight — 2014-09-07T04:41:55+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/will-a-well-ententioned-critic-skeptic-be-welcome-here.11667/post-140171>

As you said we come from very different places...physically, mentally, and emotionally but I believe we have all come to learn from each other in ways we never expected or knew we wanted to. Don't be so sure of the collective drum beat. Welcome.

### Brother John — 2014-09-07T05:04:42+0300

Brother John

### Jack Kruse — 2014-09-07T06:45:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/will-a-well-ententioned-critic-skeptic-be-welcome-here.11667/post-140176>

LOL..............Those who can make you believe absurdities, can make you commit atrocities. Not sure your why.......but you better bring your A game. The essence of the independent mind lies not in what it thinks, but in how it thinks. I'm interested in how you think..............

### caroline — 2014-09-07T07:10:24+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/will-a-well-ententioned-critic-skeptic-be-welcome-here.11667/post-140177>

> [cantweight said:](/goto/post?id=140171)
>
> As you said we come from very different places...physically, mentally, and emotionally but I believe we have all come to learn from each other in ways we never expected or knew we wanted to. Don't be so sure of the collective drum beat. Welcome.

very well said....

I have learned things I wouldn't have imagined or thought possible 3+ years ago from Dr. Kruse and all the forum members here..... but don't ever, ever assume anything about any one of us.

It has been a remarkable journey for me of getting my life back. Dr. Kruse has the flashlite - but I am doing the work!

A lot of us have been here from the very beginning - absorbing, learning, questioning, falling down, and then getting back up and dusting ourself off and moving forward.

We are all here because Dr. kruse is getting a lot of things right .... does he have it all right? I am not smart enough to figure that out! ...but I really like his odds! It certainly has worked for me!!!

Dr. K. has taught us to question everything ...including him. He has taught us that we are all different and so each of us has our own n=1

To think we are all dancing to the same beat ..... well ..... you better start reading between the lines! You couldn't be more wrong!

Welcome.....

### caroline — 2014-09-07T07:33:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/will-a-well-ententioned-critic-skeptic-be-welcome-here.11667/post-140178>

one other thing .... there is a great group of folks here.

we all do try to be respectful of each other's views and of Dr. Kruse ..... and we definitely support each other as we struggle thru all of this and strive to improve the conditions of our existence.

We all value and welcome different viewpoints .... that is how we all learn here...

I think you may be underestimating some of us!

### Inger — 2014-09-08T09:28:48+0300

> [Brother John said:](/goto/post?id=140216)
>
> I read your dietary experiments closely. I know our understanding of intestinal organisms and there symbiotic role is expanding greatly but I wonder if there is a real danger of Overloading with parasites from raw fish.

Well, Brother John... to be honest I wonder too!
Just had 3 raw mackerel heads as a smoothie again yesterday...
But here I am... digestion works amazingly well and no issues so far.... I even asked my ex yesterday evening (he is visiting me for 2 weeks, yay!) if he thinks I look sick or anything because I drink fish heads and eat so many parasites. He said no dear, you look so very healthy, I am 100% sure your weird foods are doing you only good!
He knows me better than anyone, and he tells me the truth, I know. Sometimes we might not be healthy even if we think we are that is why I asked him you see.

So this is my own N=1, I have eaten all this raw animal foods for maybe 6 years already. But I sure will tell ASAP if I see worms in the toilet  so far none

My theory is, if you have healthy stomach acid it will kill stuff that do not belong in your body?
So if I would have digestion issues, eating parasite fish could be pretty stupid... but my stomach can digest stones, I sometimes think...... maybe that is why parasites does not bother me?

I instead think of them as my friends... the bacteria and viruses in particular. Because if I cook the fish/meat the bacteria and viruses will die too.... and there goes my euphoria
I want these euphoric feelings of joy! And I am pretty sure it is because of the myriads of bacteria and viruses I get every day... it makes me feel so very much alive!

I have tested it many times... when I eat cooked.... the euphoria/joy... drops. I feel a bit less alive. I am hopelessly addicted to feeling alive!
I rather take the risk of eating some parasites.. and feel this good
life maybe is a risky business
but yeah... I need to fly

# Thread: Grounding & Dirty Electricity
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grounding-dirty-electricity.11668/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### BTA — 2014-09-07T05:48:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grounding-dirty-electricity.11668/post-140173>

The US is the only country that allows electricity to be released back into the Earth.
About 70% of the electricity delivered from the substation , returns there via the ground. Thus, the ground in the US is loaded with "dirty electricity". It would seem dangerous to put your feet on the ground that's loaded with dangerous EMF from the power grid releasing energy back into the Earth?? Cows have been found to produce less milk and die early from touching ground loaded with dirty electricity. The Sine Wave is interupted by the dirty electricity. This leads to disease as the body can't repair it's self as well.

**Dr Sam Milham, MD**

Dr. Milham's groundbreaking research demonstrates a strong correlation between the rise of the so-called 'diseases of civilization' and the historical spread of electrification.

### Da-mo — 2014-10-28T23:02:04+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grounding-dirty-electricity.11668/post-145457>

I don't think its the only country. Here in NZ the grid is a MENS system (Multiple Earth Neutral System). So long as the distribution system is balanced across the three phases there should be little residual current flow through the earthed neutral as the 3 phases sum to zero.

The earthed neutral phase is really only there to allow for fault currents to activate protection systems. These neutrals are usually connected to earth at the Star connections of transformers or generators where the three phases are connected to each other - thus cancelling out.

### Brother John — 2014-09-07T23:16:07+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicts-with-earthing-statements-here.11671/post-140222>

Earthing by walking on the earth or in salt water at the beach is represented here as being good for health.
However earthing by standing on a conductive pad or lying on a conductive sheet and grounded by a metal rod in the ground is said to present a danger of turning the subject into an antennae for non native emf.
All of these methods "ground" a person. How are they different in terms of being or not being an antennae? Have you Jack, or anyone else on this forum attempted to validate these beliefs?
If so what was the testing methodology and what were the results?

Part 2
The statement is made that Electrons are absorbed into the body when earthing. In response to a previous blog (sorry I don't recall which one it was) several electrical engineers said "No, it ain't happening". They said a positive charge will flow from the body into the earth as it does for normal electrical events with house wiring etc. The received no reply on this site. Where is the evidence that electrons migrate into the body from the earth?

Part 3
An alternative theory.
I am curious if the benefits of earthing are caused by a different event entirely. That would be that the human body builds up too much of a positive charge and that by grounding/earthing we get back into balance by sending the excess positive charge into the earth. I wonder if this was happening before the non native emf onslaught as part of natures methods of balancing energy within us. We would need to do this with constant exposure to the suns positive charge. What say you?

### Jonathin — 2014-09-07T23:46:42+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicts-with-earthing-statements-here.11671/post-140227>

I think you are confused. The only **positive** charge that flows would be protons. When protons move they generate heat such as uncoupling in mitochondria or in the examples of water freezing in Pollack's book The Fourth Phase of Water. Electrons do not generate heat. An inflamed body has a net positive change. If said body is exposed to electrons in the environment, those electrons would move into the body. I think the concern about grounding is if it is done around substantial nn-emf such as inside a typical house or urban environment. Details make a difference.

### Shijin13 — 2014-09-08T00:08:59+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicts-with-earthing-statements-here.11671/post-140228>

I added a ground sheet in Jan 13. Tested in March 13. In Dec 12 my hsCRP was .02 in March 13 my hsCRP was 4.6. the grounding sheet was the only thing I changed.

My Bun:Creatine ratio also jumped from 20 in Dec 12 to 28 in Mar 13. That was enough proof for me. when I removed the grounding sheet - my hsCRP dropped back to .02 and my Bun:creatine ratio dropped down to 20.

ETA: its the transition metals that act as the antenna to collect the nnEMF.

### yewwei.tan — 2014-09-08T03:55:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicts-with-earthing-statements-here.11671/post-140256>

Personally I've found a grounding sheet to have nothing but positive effects -- better exercise recovery, more dreaming, not feeling cold while on the sheet, etc ... All the people in the same house who use a grounding sheet also report health improvements, and recently I've had a friend living on the 10th floor report easier sleep onset and increased dreaming incidence from the use of a grounding sheet. That all sounds like better autophagy to me.

I got the grounding half sheet from EarthingOz -- [http://www.earthingoz.com.au/earthing\_sleeping\_systems.htm](http://www.earthingoz.com.au/earthing_sleeping_systems.htm) . This is basically a sheet lined with conductive silver threads sewn in, and then a stainless steel grounding rod attached to what I think is a copper wire.

The environment that I live is more favourable than Gretchen's though, since the ELF field is less than 0.01mG outside the house where I punched the grounding rod into the ground. Gretchen also isn't the only person who has experienced issues with an earthing sheet -- [http://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/earthing-grounding-why-do-i-feel-worse.10813/](http://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/earthing-grounding-why-do-i-feel-worse.10813/)

My conclusion is that deriving benefit from using a grounding sheet is highly dependent on your current location and environment. If the use of such a grounding sheet is destroying your sleep, stop using it immediately.

Because many people live in shitty environments laden with non-native EMF, this makes the use of grounding sheets a risky proposition. That said, obviously my case and those around me show that a grounding sheet can be a net positive impact on health as well. My choice was to risk $200 to try and use the sheet, and see if there was any improvement, and fortunately for me there was significant benefit.

Also remember that the environment will change all the time. Winter vs summer doesn't just bring changes to the earth's magnetic field, incident solar EMF, cosmic rays, etc .... but also in human behaviours that can radically alter your non-native EMF risk. eg: your neighbour decides to install a new electric heater. Constant re-assessment of the use of equipment such as the grounding sheet is required.

### NeilBB — 2014-09-08T04:33:38+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicts-with-earthing-statements-here.11671/post-140268>

Brother John, I actually like the question and I asked Jack a similar question 6 months ago.

[http://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/grounding-through-magnetism.9949/](http://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/grounding-through-magnetism.9949/)

I think the biggest problem with "wire grounding" as we might call it is that results seem very inconsistent depending on specifics of your situation. Jack doesn't want to "bless" any maneuver which can potentially be harmful for some so he doesn't talk about it much.

That said I do believe some people have benefited from wire grounding and I have personally used it while sleeping.

My personal rules with it have been as follows:

1\. No outlets. Wire goes out bedroom window into the earth with a rod.

2\. Minimize potential antenna surface. I don't use sheets or pads. Only an EKG type sticker on skin, as have been used in the earthing studies.

3\. Most importantly, only use in extremely low EMF environment, which my bedroom is. Wifi off. Room circuit breaker off. Minimal electric field, ac magnetic field, and radiofrequency fields all tested with appropriate meters. (Some rooms in my house, I would not use wire grounding after my testing. My bedroom specifically is optimized and extremely low EMF.)

One thing I have personally done is used wire grounding overnight with the contact directly on an injured or strained body part. Anecdotally for me in my environment, it seems to help the injured part recover much more quickly.

So I think that wire grounding might provide a simple current flow of electrons due to the voltage difference. But, it is not a semiconducting current like walking on the earth. It also does not address the more important magnetic field effect. So it's benefit is likely marginal compared to other interventions and is also potentially harmful unless you are very careful and test your results.

It is well established that the Earth maintains a negative electrical potential on its surface because of the interaction of the magnetic dynamo in the Earth and the action of the ionosphere that keeps it moving by constantly charging it. The charge ultimately comes from the sun's cosmic radiation which generates the formation of clouds. Pollack has shown this in his research and his books. When the human body is insulated from the earth, its electrical potential becomes more positive (higher cortisol and lower melatonin levels) because of the progressively higher electrical potential existing above the ground. This electrical potential, which is around 200,000 Volts between the ground and the clouds in clear weather, can be millions of volts during thunderstorms, causing electrical discharges. Lightning is the manifestions of that electrical charge.

### NeilBB — 2014-09-09T23:40:38+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicts-with-earthing-statements-here.11671/post-140424>

> [Brother John said:](/goto/post?id=140410)
>
> Neil, yeah it does seem like an increased current flow should result with both feet on the ground.
> The question about the body being an antennae when walking on the earth remains but here is my thought: If I am bare footing and I _am an antennae_ at least now the received emf can be delivered to the earth instead of _building up in my body._
> Another thing: If a human can be an antennae for nn emf doesn't that imply that trees, structures containing steel or water content are also antenna's? Would this then result in nnemf Not building up to 350 billions times more than what it used to be in our atmosphere? (350 number from a blog by JK). I'm not saying that eliminates the hazards of nn emf, but possibly eliminates an extreme accumulation and is maybe why we are still alive even with a zillion more cell phone towers.. (There must be a pony in here somewhere!)
> Thanks!
> Brother John

The simple rules of electricity tell you that when you are electrically insulated from the ground, no current can flow between your skin and the earth, by definition. But you can build up a voltage in your body (or on your skin) relative to the earth. This voltage would generally be positive relative to the earth's surface and represent potential energy, and be in the form of positive charge, which we know can be inflammatory. So the simple idea of "earthing" basically tries to eliminate this accumulated potential difference.

When you come into contact with ground, any positive voltage on your skin is quickly dissipated and you quickly become equipotential with the earth's surface. (You can easily test and verify this fact with a voltmeter.) There is no longer a "potential difference." But in order for that electrical change to occur, an electrical current has to flow from your body to the ground according to Ohm's Law. So if you were to remain in contact with the ground and continue to expose yourself to a positive ambient electrical energy, then you would set up a continuous current flow on your skin and through your body. When "grounded," you cannot store a voltage, but you can still generate a continuous current flow through your tissues. (That is essentially what is meant by becoming an antenna.)

So either way, if you are exposed to EMF, there would be some electrical alteration. If you don't change the environment (EMF source), the question becomes, are you "storing a voltage" or are you "carrying a current?"

Of course the next question is, "which is worse?" And I'd say that that probably depends on a number of other variables--hence the complications and variable results in different situations. (Clearly the ideal situation is to be in contact with earth to have access to electrons while NOT being exposed to unnatural electrical sources above that will drive that unwanted current.)

### NeilBB — 2014-09-10T00:59:31+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicts-with-earthing-statements-here.11671/post-140432>

> [Brother John said:](/goto/post?id=140427)
>
> Neil,
> I'm totally down with what you wrote. That is how I was thinking of it. That's why in my original post I said: "a positive charge will flow from the body into the earth as it does for normal electrical events with house wiring etc". That's what happens with lightening etc. _Then Jack and others said yeah but semiconductors are different._ Can't get my head around that.
> My remaining issue is I would like to see some evidence that electrons flow from the earth into us. I'm not saying I believe they don't. I just so far have no reason to know that they do. Do you know of a source that shows how or why this happens or a way of validating it happening? So far the meter testing I know about shows a voltage Drop when earthing barefoot.
> Thanks Much Neil,
> Brother Johhn

Well, in order to be able to change voltage, current has to flow. And in simple electrical conductors, current really is nothing more than flow of electrons. So when you say positive charge flows from you to ground, it's basically same as saying electrons flow from ground to you. Now that's with simple electricity. And it's probably an oversimplification at that. But it's kinda true.

In semiconductors, things get much more complicated because a lot of what's really happening is that the electromagnetic fields are exciting these electrons in various metals and similar substances that are strategically arranged. And basically the excitation travels from atom to atom like a wave. That's why it's so fast. Electrons (or holes) don't really have to "travel" all that far, their energy just has to propagate from neighbor to neighbor in some way. This movement can also propagate through 3-dimensional space rather than just down a 1-dimensional line. Semiconductor "junctions" are like walls or doors of sorts, because the "wave" becomes altered and energy transfer changes in some way at the junction due to the different electronic characteristics of the adjacent materials.

### Jack Kruse — 2014-09-10T02:16:18+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicts-with-earthing-statements-here.11671/post-140437>

-   **Although most metals are relatively good conductors of electricity, all metals do offer electrical resistance.**

-   **When the electric current of electrons meets some resistance in a material, the material heats up and so electrical energy is lost as heat.**

-   **This electrical resistance in metals increases with temperature, so as the wire heats up, even more energy is lost. (protons increase delta psi)**

-   **This wasted energy can be minimized if you can operate the circuit at a _lower_ temperature, but not always practicable.**

-   **If you cool a metal down to a sufficiently low temperature, all electrical resistance disappears!**

-   **This is called superconductivity and the metal has become a superconductor. Not all metals can do this.**

-   **If there is no electrical resistance, there is no loss of electrical energy as heat, i.e. energy transfer is 100% efficient. This is what life kinda does and why your iphone likes cold too........it increases semiconductive currents on silicon, while cold temps can stop your car battery's charge from bringing the electric charge via a copper wire from battery to your starter.**

these are just little things - but I feel like I can make a difference ...and I am not even talking about how happy and healthy I am.

### Lahelada — 2014-09-10T14:41:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicts-with-earthing-statements-here.11671/post-140526>

I agree Inger and Caroline. We get things instinctively and there is as much mileage in that as in other ways.

Having said that I would like to dip a toe in the water.
Wifi tower links need line of sight to reach maximum capacity. Carrying capacity falls off sharply when misaligned. We know that there are places where you cannot get reception even if 5 metres away you have. The Kyrillian(sp.?)photography apps that was featured here has showed that wifi waves flow and meander.,that their "route" so yo speak can be altered by putting impediments in its way. One experiment showed that opening or closing doors changes their "flow" We on this forum have concluded that Jeremy is creating a lesser EMF zone around him when working with transition metals , the transition metal sculptures acting as an antenna.
Would it therefore not be advisable to ground either barefoot or with a groun ding sheet but near a large metal structure? The grounding rod of a sheet should not be of copper though but of a lesser conductivity grade to avoid "crosstalk" In my case I am thinking of my 7ft high solid metal gate as my "EMF trap"
Would it work? If my theory is wrong please tell me why. I am not married to it.

### Josh — 2014-09-10T18:49:11+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicts-with-earthing-statements-here.11671/post-140549>

> THE SUFI SAGE, ABDULALIM OF FEZ, REFUSED TO TEACH, BUT FROM TIME TO TIME
> WOULD ADVISE PEOPLE ABOUT THE WAY TO PROCEED ON THE PATH.
> ONE DAY A DISCIPLE, WHO WAS BOTH INCAPABLE OF LEARNING AND REGULARLY DRIVEN
> ABNORMAL BY ATTENDING ’MYSTICAL CEREMONIES’, VISITED HIM.
> HE ASKED, ’HOW CAN I BEST PROFIT FROM THE TEACHINGS OF THE SAGES?’
> THE SUFI SAID, ’I AM HAPPY TO BE ABLE TO TELL YOU THAT I HAVE AN INFALLIBLE METHOD
> WHICH CORRESPONDS TO YOUR CAPACITY.’
> ’AND WHAT IS THAT, IF I AM ALLOWED TO HEAR IT?’
> ’SIMPLY STOP UP YOUR EARS AND THINK ABOUT RADISHES.’
> ’BEFORE, DURING OR AFTER THE LECTURES AND EXERCISES?’
> ’INSTEAD OF ATTENDING ANY OF THEM.’

> A MAN WHO HAD SPENT MANY YEARS TRYING TO PUZZLE OUT MEANINGS WENT TO SEE
> A SUFI AND TOLD HIM ABOUT HIS SEARCH.
> THE SUFI SAID, ”GO AWAY AND PONDER THIS – IHMN.” THE MAN WENT AWAY. WHEN HE
> CAME BACK, THE SUFI WAS DEAD. ”NOW I SHALL NEVER KNOW THE TRUTH!” MOANED
> THE PUZZLER.
> AT THAT THE MOMENT THE SUFI’S CHIEF DISCIPLE APPEARED. ”IF,” HE SAID, ”YOU
> ARE WORRYING ABOUT THE SECRET MEANING OF IHMN, I WILL TELL YOU. IT IS THE
> INITIALS OF THE PERSIAN PHRASE ’IN HURUF MAANI NADARAND’ – WHICH MEANS, ’THESE
> LETTERS HAVE NO MEANING.’”
> ”BUT WHY SHOULD I HAVE BEEN GIVEN SUCH A TASK?” SAID THE PUZZLING MAN.
> ”BECAUSE, WHEN A DONKEY COMES TO YOU, YOU GIVE HIM CABBAGES. THAT IS HIS
> NUTRITION, NO MATTER WHAT HE CALLS IT. DONKEYS PROBABLY THINK THAT THEY ARE
> DOING SOMETHING FAR MORE SIGNIFICANT THAN EATING CABBAGES.”

### Brother John — 2014-09-10T20:18:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicts-with-earthing-statements-here.11671/post-140553>

> [NeilBB said:](/goto/post?id=140424)
>
> The simple rules of electricity tell you that when you are electrically insulated from the ground, no current can flow between your skin and the earth, by definition. But you can build up a voltage in your body (or on your skin) relative to the earth. This voltage would generally be positive relative to the earth's surface and represent potential energy, and be in the form of positive charge, which we know can be inflammatory. So the simple idea of "earthing" basically tries to eliminate this accumulated potential difference.
>
> When you come into contact with ground, any positive voltage on your skin is quickly dissipated and you quickly become equipotential with the earth's surface. (You can easily test and verify this fact with a voltmeter.) There is no longer a "potential difference." But in order for that electrical change to occur, an electrical current has to flow from your body to the ground according to Ohm's Law. So if you were to remain in contact with the ground and continue to expose yourself to a positive ambient electrical energy, then you would set up a continuous current flow on your skin and through your body. When "grounded," you cannot store a voltage, but you can still generate a continuous current flow through your tissues. (That is essentially what is meant by becoming an antenna.)
>
> So either way, if you are exposed to EMF, there would be some electrical alteration. If you don't change the environment (EMF source), the question becomes, are you "storing a voltage" or are you "carrying a current?"
>
> Of course the next question is, "which is worse?" And I'd say that that probably depends on a number of other variables--hence the complications and variable results in different situations. (Clearly the ideal situation is to be in contact with earth to have access to electrons while NOT being exposed to unnatural electrical sources above that will drive that unwanted current.)

### Brother John — 2014-09-10T20:33:51+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicts-with-earthing-statements-here.11671/post-140555>

Josh,
I find those stories amusing but as I think of them a bit I feel they impart a sense of futility or worse a cruelty toward those that are having difficulties even though they continue to try... Every teacher may run into those students that are thick as a brick or seem to be, but sometimes the thick student may be the one pushing the teacher's ability to communicate. The teacher has 3 choices maybe: 1 Try to meet the challenge the student presents. 2 Tell the student to find a teacher he can understand. (IE simply acknowledging that this teacher is not "it" for everyone. That might take a bit of humility on the teacher's part.) 3 Make a joke of the students lack.
I've done all three.
Thanks,
Brother John

### Clayton — 2014-09-11T20:06:56+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicts-with-earthing-statements-here.11671/post-140657>

So I have decided to do my own little biohack based on comments here regarding sleeping directly on the ground. I had been thinking about doing this all summer but wondering if it would be better for me than being on a magnetico and within a faraday cage...I guess its time to find out. I have been sleeping in a tent far from the houses in my yard for the past three nights. I have some tweaking to do since the tent is not completely dark (although no ambient artificial light sources are nearby) I think I'll be overlaying some black-out material. I also realize that the vinyl material is probably not the best for grounding oneself so I will do something in that regard. Having said this the past three nights have been interesting...I have not slept soundly through the night, waking multiple times just due to "discomfort" of sleeping on a hard surface but despite this I have felt well rested..probably more than usual. I think if I can get in a dark environment and get to the point where I am sleeping through the entire night I will be laughing. I'm gonna to keep this up for a couple weeks and see where it leads me.

>
> 1\. No outlets. Wire goes out bedroom window into the earth with a rod.
>
> 2\. Minimize potential antenna surface. I don't use sheets or pads. Only an EKG type sticker on skin, as have been used in the earthing studies.
>

Minimal electric field, ac magnetic field, and radiofrequency fields all tested with appropriate meters. (Some rooms in my house, I would not use wire grounding after my testing. My bedroom specifically is optimized and extremely low EMF.)
>
> One thing I have personally done is used wire grounding overnight with the contact directly on an injured or strained body part. Anecdotally for me in my environment, it seems to help the injured part recover much more quickly.
>
> So I think that wire grounding might provide a simple current flow of electrons due to the voltage difference. But, it is not a semiconducting current like walking on the earth. It also does not address the more important magnetic field effect. So it's benefit is likely marginal compared to other interventions and is also potentially harmful unless you are very careful and test your results.

Neil, is the best way to test is with a body voltage meter?

I have been attaching a grounding strap when sleeping on my Magnetico but I want to make sure that I am not doing more harm. Been getting some weird feelings lately. I already have very low readings in the bedroom on my rod in is the ground right outside the bedroom and when I tested it there, it was at 0 v. When I crawl in bed with it on the millivolts drop to below -200 mV.

I am hoping that it is helping since winter will be here soon and walking outside barefoot will result in the loss of toes and I kinda like my toes but still need to get some grounding

### NeilBB — 2014-10-31T20:20:14+0200

>

The body voltage meter will give you the local ELF electric field measurement, but won't tell you about the ELF magnetic field or anything about the RF frequencies. I think they all are potentially relevant. Best to test all 3 if you gonna ground indoors...

I found in my testing that the electric field (body voltage meter) was very high when you are in direct contact with an appliance (like a lamp) or outlet, but dropped off very very rapidly with just a small distance from it. AC magnetic fields travel further but respond well to killing circuit breakers. And RF tends to pulsate and is much more diffuse and variable...

### Da-mo — 2014-11-01T01:05:07+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicts-with-earthing-statements-here.11671/post-145837>

e="Brother John, post: 140222, member: 5776"\]Earthing by walking on the earth or in salt water at the beach is represented here as being good for health.
However earthing by standing on a conductive pad or lying on a conductive sheet and grounded by a metal rod in the ground is said to present a danger of turning the subject into an antennae for non native emf.
All of these methods "ground" a person. How are they different in terms of being or not being an antennae? Have you Jack, or anyone else on this forum attempted to validate these beliefs?
If so what was the testing methodology and what were the results?\[/quote\]First of all - I havent tested nor will I be referring to any documented experiment.

That said, here is my perspective . . . please bear with me my mental abilities are not what they once were . . . .

Have you ever been messing with a radio and not gotten a clear signal - then when you started messing with the antenna on it, the signal strengthened as you touched it with your hand? I have and touching not touching the antenna instantly changes the strength of the signal.

**I see that as proof that I became part of the antenna when I touched it.**

Now lets make a distinction here - EMF as used here and in this sphere is often interpreted as electro-**magnetic**\-force. This is the force exerted upon a magnetic (paramagnetic) object. Think of it as a static magnetic feild acting upon a static magnetic object. Because everything is static there is no work done and no energy expended. There is, however, a stress placed upon the object. This stress can be measured mechanically directly as a force and electrically as a voltage.

I want you to make a slight tweak to that and consider EMF meaning electro-**motive**\-force. In this instance we have a closed electrical circuit being subjected to a fluctuating magnetic feild. As the feild fluctuates, the force described above induces electrons to flow in the circuit. Anything in the circuit opposing this flow is known as resistance (we will leave capacitance, inductance, reactance and hysteresis out of this discussion for simplicity sake). A resistance that completely stops the flow is equivalent to an open circuit (or open switch).

Next, earthing is about becoming equipotential - meaning at the same potential voltage (which we should think of as electrical stress in a static open circuit) with the earth. When you close the circuit (close the switch/make contact with the earth) the electrical stress dissipates until your are at the same voltage as the earth.

However, if while you are grounded (closed circuited) there is also a fluctuating electromotive force, electrons will continue to flow from the higher voltage to the lower. This works both sides of zero i.e. negative and positive voltages are considered higher than zero. A grounded alternating current circuit will have a current flow of electrons either to earth of back from the earth depending which side of zero volts it happens to be in any instant - there will be no flow when the sine wave passes through zero volts from either direction. There will remain an electrical stress equal to the voltage drop across the circuit proportianal to your personal resistance and your contact with the earth to electron flow.

If you are positively charged relative to the earth, electrons will flow from the earth into you.

**How do I know this is not a proton flow? Because a proton flow would involve a transfer of mass and we know that electrical flows are a tranfer of energy and not mass. If electrical flow were a transfer of mass, we could use electricity to materialise mass through electrical conductors. We would be able to conduct electrons down wires and protons down wires and make water at the other end - but we can't . . . . yet**

Now to the grounding sheet and why it is different to earthing directly . . . .

Ground sheets are metallic. Antennae are metallic. Any Electromotive force acting on a conductor creates electrical stress within it. If the sheet is grounded, any fluctuating EMF will induce electron flow between the sheet and the earth. As good a conductor as it is - in order for there to be a flow, there must be a voltage difference in order to move the electrons. The better the conductor, the less voltage difference is required but it is still there and it is proportinal to the EMF applied and the resistivity/conductivity of the sheet.

If a grounded grounding sheet is exposed to fluctuating EMF, and because it has the necessaries to be an antenna, it will still have a voltage difference present in relation to the earth. When you contact that sheet not only do you become equipotential with it instead of the earth, but you also become part of it (refer to opening paragraph about holding a radio antenna). Whatever potential the sheet remains above earth voltage, thats where you will be. This explains why grounding sheets would tend to be a bad idea in a high nnEMF environment.

a little more to come . . . . .

### Da-mo — 2014-11-01T01:31:30+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/conflicts-with-earthing-statements-here.11671/post-145839>

> [NeilBB said:](/goto/post?id=140268)
>
> 2\. Minimize potential antenna surface. I don't use sheets or pads. Only an EKG type sticker on skin, as have been used in the earthing studies.

A very important point. I think all we want is to close the circuit to earth and the smaller the antenna, the less EMF it would capture.

That said - I'd like to continue and talk about ground voltages . . . . .

In my training for operation of high voltage transmission and distribution lines we were taught about a thing referred to as step voltage. We were taught that if ever we were caught out near a high voltage fault that we should hop away from it on one leg or at least run so that your two feet never touch the ground one step apart at the same time.

Why is this?

Its because where a lot of electricity flows to/from the earth, there will be a voltage gradient in the earth decreasing in magnitude with distance from the source of the electrical fault. With high voltages earth faults, this gradient can be steep enough that the voltage difference between your feet can be enough to give you an electric shock.

So why do I bring this up?

It is relevant because where any electrical transmission system is unbalanced across the 3 phases, the imblance flows to earth via the neutral wire in a multiple earth neutral system (MENS). This connection of the neutral to earth usually is placed at the star or "Y" point of transformer and generator windings.

Therefore, **if** you live near a tranformer or generator **and** the loads are unbalanced across the 3 phases there will be power flowing to earth through the earth star neutral point of that equipment. This will creates a voltage gradient through the earth which diminishes with distance from that point. The magnitudes will obviously be way less than the fault currents described above referring to step voltages, but they will still be there.

High voltage installations are built upon buried earth mats to help dissipate theses voltage gradients from faults and imbalances and in general the larger the installation the better the phases will be balanced so that there are normally low step voltages in the earth. However, as the voltages are stepped down through the distribution system, there will likely be more imbalances across the phases in localised areas even though the system overall is balanced. (Note that this does not mean it is a good idea to live near large installations - it is a very bad idea)

**Upshot - ground voltage can vary depending on the condition and balance of your local distribution network and your distance from MENS earthing points.**

Da Mo,
Thanks much for your time and effort of putting these thoughts together. What you say about 3 phase is very interesting as well as all the rest. ### Jude — 2014-09-08T14:09:00+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/when-faced-with-extreme-anxiety-or-stress-from-life.11674/post-140298>

JK..................................

When faced with extreme anxiety or stress from life my best advice to help you through it? Stand in the ocean when it is 50-55 degrees with your feet firmly planted in the sand.........you will ground yourself to improve your autonomic nervous system faster than anything that I know of. It is amazing. Once done, then walk on the beaches edge with feet in water. I have told many an educational consultant this......I do it every time I am near a body of salt water. It combines, CT, earthing, and Mg floatation to lower HS crp and improve LR and mitochondrial function in nanoseconds.

# Thread: Grounding in a basement
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grounding-in-a-basement.11677/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 6
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### nicld — 2014-09-08T20:02:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grounding-in-a-basement.11677/post-140311>

Winter will be here before we know it and there will be times it will be too dangerous to sit outside under my giant oak tree. I know that it was said that one can get grounded through concrete. We have an old basically root cellar for a basement (still have the remnant of the stairs to the outside down there) that I will be working on getting the peeling paint off of the floors and having pure concrete. I doubt if there was a vapor barrier put underneath since it the walls are 2 feet thick and old.

_**Can I still get some benefit from sitting on this in the winter?**_

I know that I am going to greatly miss my grounding time but it is hard to get out there with 3 feet of snow and -20F windchills. I am even thinking of getting a grounding rod and using that in the basement since we do have a little open concrete that exposes dirt that I can “plug” into. **_Thoughts??_**

### Jonathin — 2014-09-08T20:18:07+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grounding-in-a-basement.11677/post-140313>

If you are thinking about doing some reconstruction, I would consider putting down ferromagnetic rock such as basalt into the soil. I have also heard of using magnetite worked into the soil. Even compacted AB (gravel and fines) might add the magnetic strength. You might not consider concrete a necessity if you did that.

### nicld — 2014-09-08T20:29:01+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grounding-in-a-basement.11677/post-140316>

No, no reconstruction in the basement, just scrapping off old paint. Next house maybe, but not spending the money in this one.

### caroline — 2014-09-09T02:16:05+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grounding-in-a-basement.11677/post-140343>

Josh I think has used magnetite ...I think I remember that right.....

### cinnamon — 2014-09-09T02:43:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grounding-in-a-basement.11677/post-140347>

Based on my own n=1, yes, I think you might find grounding in the basement works. Probably not as well as being barefoot in your garden. However, when the temps are well below freezing, ice is everywhere, and you are risking frostbite, it could be worth a try!

When we first started talking about grounding on the forum it was the middle of winter here (January or February?) I started spending a half hour or so each day in my basement with my bare feet on the concrete floor. It seemed a bit unlikely to be useful to my brain at the time (I'm sure I was low on DHA!) But, strangely enough, I noticed some improvements in body composition almost immediately. In particular, my butt seemed firmer. And who wouldn't want that? LOL

Now I need to mention that my basement is old - the house was built more than 100 years ago. So, chances are excellent that there is no vapor barrier.

### nicld — 2014-09-09T15:51:44+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grounding-in-a-basement.11677/post-140386>

> [cinnamon said:](/goto/post?id=140347)
>
> Based on my own n=1, yes, I think you might find grounding in the basement works. Probably not as well as being barefoot in your garden. However, when the temps are well below freezing, ice is everywhere, and you are risking frostbite, it could be worth a try!
>
> When we first started talking about grounding on the forum it was the middle of winter here (January or February?) I started spending a half hour or so each day in my basement with my bare feet on the concrete floor. It seemed a bit unlikely to be useful to my brain at the time (I'm sure I was low on DHA!) But, strangely enough, I noticed some improvements in body composition almost immediately. In particular, my butt seemed firmer. And who wouldn't want that? LOL
>
> Now I need to mention that my basement is old - the house was built more than 100 years ago. So, chances are excellent that there is no vapor barrier.

We have an old old basement too. I think that we saw that the first easement was put on the property in 1929.

I will try it, can't hurt. I agree, not as good as sitting outside but that is going to not be an option soon

Thanks everyone, now to get cleaning the basement again.

Every disease is already cured by mama nature - just look out your window. The first asprin came from bark. Digitalis first came from a flower. The Yew tree was the first chemo drug for cancer. Here's one that's amazing: The One Bacteria That Causes Tooth Decay, Acne, Tuberculosis and Pneumonia Can Be Killed By This One Seed - Gram positive bacteria, which cause tooth decay, acne, tuberculosis, Streptococcus pneumoniae, Francisella tularensis, and leprosy are all killed by anacardic chemicals present in cashew nuts which are actually seeds. Amazing what's out there yet to be found.

### caroline — 2014-09-10T12:47:51+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sexy-younger-you.11680/post-140520>

Okay .... day #2 ....Esther Blum - she has a masters in nutrition ...really?

oh my, oh my, oh my ..... we are so far past all of this. This is exactly what I saw in Orlando - such old an tired info.

I was mesmerised by the fact that she was/is in private practise and decided to start clients on a paleo diet because it seemed like a good idea ....but didn't do it herself. Apparently it was years before she tried it .......isn't that very weird?

And - I am really wondering about Anna Cabeca .... she gives her kid fruit juice popsicles????? holy cow!
and ..... she puts meat etc. in a crockpot overnite and then turns it on reheat before they have dinner...did I hear that right???? I can't believe she hasn't given her family food poisoning....

and - Paleo is a plant based diet .....hmmmm ...veg and fruit first - I think that is what she said....

and - when on vacation just enjoy yourself .... of course ......but why would you start shoving carbs in your mouth??? when we know better - we should do better.
I can totally understand a little carb - in the moment ....but I love how I feel and how I look and how I finally feel good in my own skin ....why, oh why .... would I throw that out the window?

I love the way I eat - I feel so much better ...a bagel crosses my mind every once in the blue moon .... but only a little flirtation .....I am not giving up how I feel for a bagel. not even a NYC bagel!

I don't know if I can listen to anymore of these ..... maybe with a bottle or two of Malbec....I've got way better things to do... but in the interest of research....

What say you?

### caroline — 2014-09-11T11:51:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sexy-younger-you.11680/post-140628>

episode #3 ......Kim Serafini

Did anyone listen to this one? I kind of liked it at first.....and then I kinda went - wait a minute....

She talks a lot about positive self thought and the power of gratitude, meditation etc. ...all good - great stuff to do.

but it seems to me this is all putting the cart before the horse a little.

In my experience - once I did the leptin reset, C/T, drinking good water, grounding, sunshine, great sleep, reducing fake lite and nnEMF .... then - all the good stuff happened!
I got all those positive affects and benefits by making real changes in the conditions of my existence

My brain fog cleared, my attitude changed, my body changed, I became more aware, I got new neural connections \[I hope!\] and a hundred other things.

and now I can invoke the power of gratitude and meditate - as an adjunct to what I have already achieved.

I haven't said this very well.......

### caroline — 2014-09-12T01:15:23+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sexy-younger-you.11680/post-140676>

I have been thinking more about this ...and Anna Cabeca ....

She said she went on a cruise with her family and was eating all the wrong stuff ....so she gained weight, was bloated and sluggish and had a muffin top ..we have all been there and done that years ago and pre JK \[except for Martin!\] she said the last nite she had a beautiful new dress that had looked great \[she has a pretty spectacular body btw\]. Of course the dress was too tight etc. and she felt awful. She went out into the hall and saw a man she had seen before and he told her how beautiful she looked .... so she said - yes I have to improve my thoughts and tell myself I am beautiful - but how does that fix a dress that is way too tight and you feel like a sausage - it sure wouldn't for me and I would be miserable. I at least thought that she would know better. We have to build this from the ground up.
I may have a slip up on a cruise - maybe ....but there is no way I am going back to carb hell!!! hell no!
I am not giving up how great I feel - and my mini skirts for anything!

I love, love, love the way I am eating .....the only problem is - in my new and improved relaxed state - I could over do the wine......but that is really, really good for me ...and that is what makes life fun ...especially enjoyed with people you love and care about - been there done that and I wouldn't change one single second!

Stella and I keep talking about what we will eat when I go to Miami .... it will be lots of great food - slow roasted cuban pork, oysters, lobsters, shrimp etc. etc. The very thought makes me drool!

But we all know so much better now ....how come they don't?

### caroline — 2014-09-19T11:44:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sexy-younger-you.11680/post-141388>

Dr. Srini Pillay's webinar

I really loved Dr.Pillay .... a lot of great information .... not necessarily new - but so much to keep at the forefont of our thinking in our daily lives.

\- enjoy who we are as humans ...stop trying to make everything perfect - recognise it isn't possible to be perfect

\- put a flashlight on positive things....not all the negative chatter in our life

\- forgive ourselves ...negative stuff happens

\- am I just trying to get thru everyday - just barely coping ..... what can I do that would be truly fulfilling?

\- frame you goals as positives .... focus on "I can"

\- examine the pictures that hang in the museum of our mind ... maybe we need to switch them out for more updated pictures

\- How we feel about ourself transfers to other people we come in contact with. Appreciate and observe the person we are with and stop observing ourself. Don't focus on the negative thoughts we have about ourself.

\- and finally ...some thoughtful things about sex ... at the end of a busy, exhausting day - it doesn't always have to be mind bending acrobatics ....it can be touching and caring and hugging and appreciating. This is what the book I am reading now is about.

### caroline — 2014-09-19T22:56:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sexy-younger-you.11680/post-141433>

I have been thinking about what I wrote above .... tossing and turning all nite .... coffee too late!
Once again .... all this stuff is - "after care"

If our Ferrari is running smoothly .... this is all good stuff to fine tune...

But ... we have to focus from the ground up - on our foundation ...on the three legged stool. Without this foundation we are like a house of cards - we will get blown over ...sooner rather than later!

All these intelligent people keep telling us to focus on the positives ... train our brain - but as Martin said above - if our hair is on fire????

Dr. Kruse has taught us all so much more and so much better - we are learning from the bottom up ...and I am now thinking all the positives just start happening. I don't have to force myself to have positive thoughts - I just do!
right now I am looking at the sun rise ...later I will look at the ocean - and spend the day with a very dear friend and buy her lunch for her birthday and laugh and hug - and talk to all kinds of interesting strangers at the organic market ......

After we get the basics of fixing our circadian mismatches ... and eat a few dozen oysters ..... fun things happen - even tho life smacks us around every once and awhile.

But - we are now resilient and strong and focused and caring and kind ....and over the top positive energy is flowing!

The biggest thing I have learned lately from JK .... is when ever possible invoke the WTF rule. That is the one I personally needed the most .... and I got all that here and so much more at jackkruse.com!

Have a wonderful day everyone!

### Jack Kruse — 2014-09-24T15:09:03+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sexy-younger-you.11680/post-141829>

How? Reflection. Reflection turns experience to insight. Just because we get older does not mean we get wise. Out of reflection we create to waves of knowledge. When we reflect inward, we think, analyze and conclude. When we reflect outward, we 'reflect' and 'project' to others the insights and learning that we have gained and have integrated into our own. Reflecting honestly on things we believe to be basic truths can sometimes be uncomfortable. However, unshakable certainty only remains possible by pretending some things to be absolutely true, while shutting myself off from other equally true but apparently contradictory realities.

In physics everything is about waves.........NeilBB knows where I am going. Its de Broglie pilot wave theory that challenges the Standard model. This idea is buried in the words above. Here you can see how the science integrates with out observable reality.

### Jack Kruse — 2014-09-25T03:29:29+0300

youre slow because of where you live..............
When you have excess energies in the environment it steals electrons from your cell membranes and mitochondria.

Think about Direct TV and a thunderstorm. You can’t watch your program when the storm is present and similarly in biology your mitochondrial cant work as well when your environment is filled with technology gadgets that emit excessive electromagnetic energies and blue light.

These two things destroy DHA in your cell membranes.

I showed people in my first biohack that if I controlled the input and out put of mitochondria to a great degree I could lose weight fast. I was losing electrons so fast I was altering the leptin receptor in my brain. I was leaking energy back to the environment.

This loss was cause by my lifestyle choices and day job where I was bathing my environment in these things.

Mitochondrial density are greatest in the brain, heart, and immune system. It should be no surprise to anyone that the complex systems in humans use the most electrons.

Where these systems form meets function is at the PVN in the brainstem. When you lose your magnetic sense here, health goes south, you get adrenal fatigue first.

Ask any functional doc and they will tell you it appears the world has AF by ASI testing. They do.

You do because of the donut hole.

# Thread: High-Fives are the new hugs.....

**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 13

### Tanya — 2014-09-09T23:37:20+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/high-fives-are-the-new-hugs.11685/post-140423>

[http://www.dailynewsen.com/politics...gs-in-litigious-and-scary-times-h2604722.html](http://www.dailynewsen.com/politics/fist-bumps-are-the-new-hugs-in-litigious-and-scary-times-h2604722.html)

### cantweight — 2014-09-09T23:54:19+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/high-fives-are-the-new-hugs.11685/post-140425>

Oh that just makes me sad. My sons 3rd grade teacher hugged and kissed those kids everyday and at first I was shocked no one opposed it....seems everyone opposes affection these days when we need it most.

My son looked forward to Valentines Day like never before because she would put on red lipstick and leave a "kiss" on all the kids cheeks. I happened to be in the school that day and saw a line outside her door of her former students waiting for their "kiss".

It was awesome.

### nonchalant — 2014-09-10T00:04:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/high-fives-are-the-new-hugs.11685/post-140428>

In a quantum sense, it is more than sad. This "hands-off" policy is a form of neglect.

### Brother John — 2014-09-10T00:31:20+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/high-fives-are-the-new-hugs.11685/post-140430>

Tanya,
Yeah. The road to hell is paved with good intentions. Etiquette for hugging is a slowly developing thing even for adults. What I think would be just way better is just to define what a hug is. I E hands are here and here but not down there or there. But no that's too simple...
I have an incredible book called "Hug Therapy" and it is mostly about different types of hugs and the models are comical drawings of Bears hugging. Like polar bears. It was written by Kathleen Keating. It's a little thin book and on a 10 scale it's a 10. I just checked and it's available in print or kindle and it's cheap 8bucks for print and 7 for kindle. Sometimes I look at the pictures when there's no one around to hug. (Don't tell people I do that.) Here is a quote: The requirements for being a Hug Therapist and being a client are the same. Just being.
Here is the amazon link:[http://www.amazon.com/Hug-Therapy-B...F8&qid=1410297836&sr=1-1&keywords=hug+therapy](http://www.amazon.com/Hug-Therapy-Book-Kathleen-Keating/dp/1568380941/ref=sr_sp-atf_image_1_1?s=books&ie=UTF8&qid=1410297836&sr=1-1&keywords=hug+therapy)
Brother John

# Thread: Transforming Light into Crystal
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/transforming-light-into-crystal.11688/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 16
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jonathin — 2014-09-10T05:56:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/transforming-light-into-crystal.11688/post-140488>

Maybe Jack is not crazy!

**'Solid' light could compute previously unsolvable problems**

"Researchers at Princeton University have begun crystallizing light as part of an effort to answer fundamental questions about the physics of matter.

The researchers are not shining light through crystal – **they are transforming light into crystal**. As part of an effort to develop exotic materials such as room-temperature superconductors, **the researchers have locked together photons, the basic element of light, so that they become fixed in plac**e.

"It's something that we have never seen before," said Andrew Houck, an associate professor of electrical engineering and one of the researchers. "**This is a new behavior for light**."

The results raise intriguing possibilities for a variety of future materials. But the researchers also intend to use the method to address questions about the fundamental study of matter, a field called **condensed matter physics.**

"We are interested in exploring – and ultimately **controlling and directing – the flow of energy at the atomic level,**" said Hakan Türeci, an assistant professor of electrical engineering and a member of the research team. "The goal is to better understand current materials and processes and to evaluate materials that we cannot yet create."

The team's findings, reported online on Sept. 8 in the journal Physical Review X, are part of an effort to answer fundamental questions about atomic behavior by creating a device that can simulate the behavior of subatomic particles. Such a tool could be an invaluable method for answering questions about atoms and molecules that are not answerable even with today's most advanced computers."

[more at http://phys.org/news/2014-09-solid-previously-unsolvable-problems.html](http://phys.org/news/2014-09-solid-previously-unsolvable-problems.html)

### Jack Kruse — 2014-09-11T02:55:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/transforming-light-into-crystal.11688/post-140581>

Now consider this: Transition metals, in the middle of the periodic table are being used to develop superconducting alloys.

The potential use of superconductors is enormous e.g.

Power cables lose lots of energy, so zero energy loss transmission along power lines would be great.

Electrical circuits e.g. in computers, would work faster.

The power of electromagnets would be increased with zero resistance flow of electricity through the coils of the magnets.

Unfortunately there some big technological problems inhibiting the use of superconductors.

The main problem is obtaining the really low operating temperature required for superconductivity.

In the first experiments, temperatures as low as –265oC were required.

But, using transition metal alloys or oxides and some ceramic materials based on transitional metal compounds it is possible to get the operating temperature upto to as high as –1300C !!!

To get these low temperatures requires energy, which is what you are trying to save!

In most 'commercial' technologic systems many it is both uneconomic and impractical to operate electrical systems at these very low temperatures to superconduct.

Until superconductors are developed that can work at room temperature, only very expensive specialized researched projects can afford to use them. Guess what folks: TOPOLOGIC INSULATORS MAKE SUPERCONDUCTORS AT ROOM TEMP AND BODY TEMPERATURE and they function when WET and they transform light to condensed matter..............BOOM

### Jack Kruse — 2014-09-12T14:52:55+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/transforming-light-into-crystal.11688/post-140731>

The length of hydrogen bonds depends on bond strength, temperature, and pressure. The bond strength itself is dependent on temperature, pressure, bond angle, and environment. This is usually characterized by local [dielectric](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dielectric) constant. Water has a very high dielectric constant but it is quickly adjustable by the environment. When it is in a topologic insulator its dielectric constant varies over a large range and seems to be controlled by ROS and light polarization within the cell. The hydrogen bonding around proteins is very complex and varied because of the environmental changes a cell faces. What do the hydrogen bonding do to proteins? Several studies have shown that hydrogen bonds play an important role for the stability between subunits in multimeric proteins. light transforms our protein polymers.

Thanks @[PaulG](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1838/)! I think I might be starting to see how light can stay inside a mitochondrion. And how we can increase our personal gravity.
